title: Pi Agent explained in 6min..
summary: Pi is described as a unique agent framework that enables various use cases like OpenClaw integration. The video compares Pi's design against other frontier agent tools like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Antigravity in terms of handling complex harness layers.
